mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE DATE(reg_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outpatient_visit WHERE DATE(visit_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charge_order WHERE pay_status = 1 AND DATE(pay_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) FROM charge_order WHERE pay_status = 1 AND DATE(pay_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prescription WHERE status = 2
